name: Ajar
recipeIngredient: 1 sm Fresh red or green chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the rice vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper until the sugar and salt are dissolved.
2. Quarter the cucumber lengthwise and remove the seeds.
3. Cut the quarters crosswise into 1/8-inch thick slices.
4. Add the cucumber, onion, cilantro, and chili to the vinegar dressing; toss until combined.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
